seed_instruction: Write an email to my boss telling him that I am quitting.
org_constraint: The phrase "thank you for the opportunity" must appear at least twice in the email.
new_constraint: Refrain from using the phrase "thank you for the opportunity."
instruction: Write an email to my boss telling him that I am quitting. The phrase "thank you for the opportunity" must appear at least twice in the email. Refrain from using the phrase "thank you for the opportunity."
response:
Subject: Resignation - [Your Name]

Dear [Boss's Name],

Please accept this email as formal notification that I am resigning from my position as [Your Job Title] at [Company Name]. My last day will be [Your Last Date].

I want to express my sincere gratitude for the opportunity to work alongside such a talented team over the past [Duration]. I have truly valued the experience and the growth I have gained during my time here.

Thank you for the opportunity to contribute to the company's success and for your guidance throughout my tenure. I am committed to ensuring a smooth transition during my remaining time, and I am happy to assist in training my replacement or wrapping up any pending projects.

I wish you and the entire team nothing but the best in the future.

Sincerely,

[Your Name]
